cards.front: What is the fundamental principle behind designing a learning system?
Which type of learning system is based on the idea that behavior is the result of external stimuli?
What is the primary goal of an optimal learning system?
cards.back: To maximize the rate of learning

cards.front: What is the term used to describe the design of a learning system to produce an optimal rate of learning?
Which type of learning system is based on the idea that learning is a result of reinforcement?
